name: Ginger Dressing/lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the lemon juice and beef bouillon.
2. Add soy sauce, sugar, and grated ginger to the mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Chill the dressing thoroughly in the refrigerator.
5. Serve over greens, sliced cucumbers, or tomatoes.
FROM: JEANETTE MURCH (PNNN10B)
